job_title: Account Solution Engineer, Federal Region (All Levels)
job_description:
• Work closely with Product, FDE, and cross-OU SMEs to continuously sharpen technical depth, close skill gaps, and influence roadmap through structured feedback loops.
• Identify automation and process improvement opportunities—intake both process and technical requirements to remove friction and accelerate activationOwn a crisp POC→customer transition—hand off to accountable delivery lanes (customer CoE, SI, ProServ, FDE) and execute clean transfer to ensure durable activation and scalable outcomesBuild reusable accelerators (POC assets, playbooks, best practices) and enable others to scale deliveryDrive Voice of the Customer into Product.
• Inform messaging/plays with Product Marketing 7+ years customer-facing solution/technical architecture (pre-sales, consulting, implementation) with increasing scope/influence.
• Growth mindset: willingness to continually sharpen technical/advisory skills through required enablement, labs, courses, and certifications.
• Experience with “vibe coding” tooling is a plus.
• Experience with agentic engineering tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Agentforce Vibes, etc)SQL and/or Python proficiency (Jupyter/pandas helpful) and comfort with modern cloud data platforms/analytics tooling (Snowflake/Databricks/BigQuery.
• Experience with other agent platforms (e.
• Public Sector background: Federal Civilian, DoW, Aerospace, Intel experience strongly preferred.

job_title: Account Solution Engineer - Federal Civilian (All Levels)
job_description:
• Deliver world-class product demonstrations that tell a compelling story, showing how Salesforce solves specific agency missions needed to achieve the functional requirements of the customer.
• Create end-to-end technical architectures and solutions that integrate Salesforce’s Agentic Enterprise Platform with the unique security and enterprise architecture needed to achieve the technical win.
• Drive activation by partnering with customers on agent definition, configuration, and deployment strategy to accelerate production readinessIdentify automation and process improvement opportunities by intaking both process and technical requirements to remove friction and accelerate activationBuild reusable accelerators (demo environments, components, POC assets, playbooks, best practices) and enable others to scale deliveryDrive Voice of the Customer into Product.
• Inform messaging/plays with Product MarketingLeverage modern 3rd-party development tools and AI-assisted coding to rapidly build and iterate on platform configurations, front-end experiences and custom components.
• 7+ years customer-facing solution/technical architecture (pre-sales, consulting, implementation) with increasing scope/influence.
• Proficiency of Salesforce Core (Public Sector Solutions, Sales, Service, Experience Cloud) and the Data 360/Agentforce stack.
• Experience with agentic engineering tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Agentforce Vibes, etc).
• Willingness to continually sharpen technical/advisory skills through required enablement, labs, courses, and certifications.

• As an Account Solution Engineer, also known as a "Presales Consultant," "Sales Consultant", ”Pre -Sales Engineer” , “Sales Engineer” or "SE", you'll be a key player in the sales cycle, delivering thought leadership and owning solutions to enhance our customers' experience.
• With your technical and sales skills, you'll present our product offerings, address objections, and inspire confidence in our technology infrastructure.
• Understand the customer’s needs, and establish Salesforce’s product as the best solution that solves unique challenges.
• Develop and deliver innovative custom solutions, build and present customized demos of Salesforce products including solution concepts to key decision-makers to address their business issues and needs showing business value.
• Required Qualifications:Must have hands-on solid Salesforce experienceMust have fluency in both Arabic & EnglishExperience implementing Digital Transformation strategies and delivering increased success to their customers.
• We are open to a variety of backgrounds for the role.
• Proven oral, written, presentation, and interpersonal communication and relationship skills.
• Proven time management skills in a dynamic team environment.
